info.title: pywinrt
info.description: Py/WinRT is a tool for generating a Python projection of any Windows Runtime library.

options.name: --input
options.description: Windows metadata to include in projection

options.name: --reference
options.description: Windows metadata to reference from projection

options.name: --include
options.description: One or more prefixes to include in projection

options.name: --exclude
options.description: One or more prefixes to exclude from projection

options.name: --component-dlls
options.description: Set this flag when generating projection for user components that will ship with the required .dlls in the Python package
